title: Khejroli Heat Wave
lead: Khejroli is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.43. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Khejroli has led to extremely high temperatures, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 14.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 19.2 km/h. 
 These conditions are causing significant distress to the local population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
